```typescriptreact
type Tab = 'phenix-navigator' | 'repository' | 'library' | 'onboarding' | 'shield' | 'compose' | 'safe' | 'heartbeat' | 'tetrahedron' | 'first-light' | 'maintenance' | 'kenosis' | 'forensic' | 'pre-launch' | 'broadcast' | 'calibration' | 'abdication' | 'module-maker' | 'module-manager' | 'my-modules' | 'somatic' | 'breath' | 'sonic' | 'nerd-lab' | 'math' | 'story' | 'faq' | 'features' | 'love-letter' | 'manifesto' | 'grimoire' | 'stars' | 'frequencies' | 'survival' | 'phenix' | 'coherence-quest' | 'about';

function App() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<Tab>('shield');
  const [safeMenuOpen, setSafeMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [phenixOpen, setPhenixOpen] = useState(false);
  const [tick, setTick] = useState(0);
  const [currentFlowAction, setCurrentFlowAction] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Update tab statuses every second (for live computation)
  useEffect(() => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => setTick(t => t + 1), 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, []);

  // Compute tab statuses from real system state
  const tabStatuses = useMemo(() => computeTabStatuses(), [tick]);
  const [safeMenuPayload, setSafeMenuPayload] = useState<import('./types/shield.types').ProcessedPayload | null>(null);
  const { processed, buffer, dismissPayload, deepProcessingQueue } = useShieldStore();

  // Handle seamless flow actions
  const handleFlowAction = useCallback((actionId: string) => {
    setCurrentFlowAction(actionId);

    // Map flow actions to actual functionality
    switch (actionId) {
      case 'emergency_shield':
        setActiveTab('shield');
        triggerHapticPulse('medium');
        break;
      case 'message_processing':
        setActiveTab('shield');
        triggerHapticPulse('light');
        break;
      case 'energy_recovery':
        setActiveTab('somatic');
        triggerHapticPulse('light');
        break;
      case 'voltage_calibration':
        setActiveTab('shield');
        triggerHapticPulse('medium');
        break;
      case 'phenix_conversation':
        setPhenixOpen(true);
        triggerHapticPulse('light');
        break;
      case 'creative_exploration':
        setActiveTab('module-maker');
        triggerHapticPulse('light');
        break;
      case 'relationship_modeling':
        setActiveTab('math');
        triggerHapticPulse('light');
        break;
      case 'system_optimization':
        setActiveTab('maintenance');
        triggerHapticPulse('light');
        break;
      case 'knowledge_expansion':
        setActiveTab('nerd-lab');
        triggerHapticPulse('light');
        break;
      default:
        console.log('Unknown flow action:', actionId);
    }

    // Clear the action after a brief delay
    setTimeout(() => setCurrentFlowAction(null), 500);
  }, []);

  return (
    <div 
      className="app"
      style={{
        minHeight: '100vh',
        background: CosmicTheme.backgroundGradient,
        fontFamily: 'Inter, system-ui, sans-serif',
        color: CosmicTheme.colors.saturn,
      }}
    >
      {/* Geometric Background Pattern */}
      <div 
        style={{
          position: 'fixed',
          top: 0,
          left: 0,
          right: 0,
          bottom: 0,
          background: CosmicTheme.backgroundGradient,
          pointerEvents: 'none',
          zIndex: 0,
        }}
      />

      {/* Tetrahedron Grid Pattern */}
      <div 
        style={{
          position: 'fixed',
          top: 0,
          left: 0,
          right: 0,
          bottom: 0,
          background: CosmicTheme.backgroundGradient,
          opacity: 0.3,
          pointerEvents: 'none',
          zIndex: 0,
        }}
      />

      {/* Main Content */}
      <div 
        style={{
          position: 'relative',
          zIndex: 1,
          maxWidth: 1200,
          width: '100%',
          margin: '0 auto',
          padding: '24px 16px',
        }}
      >
        {/* Header */}
        <header 
          style={{
            textAlign: 'center',
            marginBottom: 32,
          }}
        >
          {/* Logo */}
          <div 
            style={{
              display: 'inline-flex',
              alignItems: 'center',
              justifyContent: 'center',
              width: 80,
              height: 80,
              borderRadius: 20,
              background: GOD_CONFIG.theme.gradient.shield,
              marginBottom: 16,
              boxShadow: `0 8px 32px ${GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.accent}30`,
              position: 'relative',
            }}
          >
            <Shield size={40} color="#fff" strokeWidth={1.5} />
            {/* Tetrahedron accent */}
            <Hexagon 
              size={16} 
              color="#fff" 
              style={{ 
                position: 'absolute', 
                bottom: -4, 
                right: -4,
                backgroundColor: GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.primary,
                borderRadius: 4,
                padding: 2,
              }} 
            />
          </div>

          <h1 
            style={{
              fontSize: 28,
              fontWeight: 700,
              fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
              background: GOD_CONFIG.theme.gradient.shield,
              WebkitBackgroundClip: 'text',
              WebkitTextFillColor: 'transparent',
              backgroundClip: 'text',
              margin: 0,
              marginBottom: 8,
            }}
          >
            {GOD_CONFIG.name}
          </h1>

          <p 
            style={{
              fontSize: 14,
              color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary,
              margin: 0,
              maxWidth: 400,
              marginLeft: 'auto',
              marginRight: 'auto',
              lineHeight: 1.5,
            }}
          >
            {GOD_CONFIG.tagline}
            <br />
            <span style={{ color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted, fontSize: 12 }}>
              Impedance Matching for Human Communication
            </span>
            <br />
            <span style={{ 
              color: GOD_CONFIG.heartbeat.statuses.green.color, 
              fontSize: 11,
              fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
              fontWeight: 600,
              marginTop: 4,
              display: 'inline-block',
            }}>
              Status: {GOD_CONFIG.status} • Mission: {GOD_CONFIG.mission}
            </span>
          </p>

          {/* Status bar */}
          <div 
            style={{
              display: 'flex',
              justifyContent: 'center',
              gap: 16,
              marginTop: 16,
            }}
          >
            <div 
              style={{
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                gap: 6,
                padding: '6px 12px',
                backgroundColor: GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.secondary,
                borderRadius: 20,
                fontSize: 11,
                fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
              }}
            >
              <Zap size={12} color={buffer.length > 0 ? GOD_CONFIG.voltage.medium.color : GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted} />
              <span style={{ color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>
                Buffer: {buffer.length}
              </span>
            </div>
            <div 
              style={{
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                gap: 6,
                padding: '6px 12px',
                backgroundColor: GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.secondary,
                borderRadius: 20,
                fontSize: 11,
                fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
              }}
            >
              <Shield size={12} color={GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.accent} />
              <span style={{ color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>
                Processed: {processed.length}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Cognitive Flow - Seamless AI-Guided Experience */}
        <CognitiveFlow
          onFlowAction={handleFlowAction}
          className="cognitive-flow-main"
        />

        {/* Tab Content */}
        {activeTab === 'phenix-navigator' && (
          <div className="phenix-navigator-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>🔺 Loading Phenix Navigator Demo...</div>}>
              <PhenixNavigatorDemo />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'repository' && (
          <div className="repository-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>📦 Loading Module Repository...</div>}>
              <ModuleRepository />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'library' && (
          <div className="library-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>📚 Loading Cognitive Shield Library...</div>}>
              <CognitiveShieldLibrary />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'onboarding' && (
          <div className="onboarding-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>🎭 Loading Perfect Onboarding...</div>}>
              <PerfectOnboarding />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'shield' && (
          <div className="shield-tab">
            <SettingsPanel />
            <MessageInput />
            <CatchersMitt />
            
            {/* Processed Messages */}
            {processed.length > 0 && (
              <div style={{ marginTop: 24 }}>
                <div 
                  style={{
                    display: 'flex',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    gap: 8,
                    marginBottom: 16,
                    color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary,
                    fontSize: 12,
                    fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
                  }}
                >
                  <MessageSquare size={14} />
                  PROCESSED SIGNALS
                </div>
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 16 }}>
                  {/* Deep Processing Queue */}
                  {deepProcessingQueue.length > 0 && (
                    <DeepProcessingQueue queue={deepProcessingQueue} />
                  )}

                  {/* Processed Messages */}
                  {processed.map((payload) => (
                    <ProcessedPayloadCard
                      key={payload.id}
                      payload={payload}
                      onDismiss={() => dismissPayload(payload.id)}
                      onNeedSupport={() => {
                        setSafeMenuPayload(payload);
                        setSafeMenuOpen(true);
                      }}
                    />
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Empty State */}
            {processed.length === 0 && buffer.length === 0 && (
              <div 
                style={{
                  textAlign: 'center',
                  padding: '48px 24px',
                  color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted,
                }}
              >
                <Shield 
                  size={48} 
                  color={GOD_CONFIG.theme.border.default}
                  style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}
                />
                <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: 14 }}>
                  Your Shield is active.
                </p>
                <p style={{ margin: '8px 0 0', fontSize: 12 }}>
                  Paste a message above to begin processing.
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'compose' && (
          <div className="compose-tab">
            <ResponseComposer />
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'heartbeat' && (
          <div className="heartbeat-tab">
            <HeartbeatPanel />
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'tetrahedron' && (
          <div className="tetrahedron-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Tetrahedron Protocol...</div>}>
              <TetrahedronProtocol enableSimulation={true} />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'first-light' && (
          <div className="first-light-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading First Light Verification...</div>}>
              <FirstLightVerification />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'maintenance' && (
          <div className="maintenance-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Mesh Maintenance...</div>}>
              <MeshMaintenance />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'kenosis' && (
          <div className="kenosis-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Kenosis Check...</div>}>
              <KenosisCheck />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'forensic' && (
          <div className="forensic-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Forensic Reconstruction...</div>}>
              <ForensicReconstruction />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'pre-launch' && (
          <div className="pre-launch-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Pre-Launch Sequence...</div>}>
              <PreLaunchSequence />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'broadcast' && (
          <div className="broadcast-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Universal Node Broadcast...</div>}>
              <UniversalNodeBroadcast />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'calibration' && (
          <div className="calibration-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Calibration Report...</div>}>
              <CalibrationReport />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'abdication' && (
          <div className="abdication-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Simulated Abdication Report...</div>}>
              <SimulatedAbdicationReport />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'module-maker' && (
          <div className="module-maker-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Module Maker...</div>}>
              <ModuleMaker />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'module-manager' && (
          <div className="module-manager-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Module Manager...</div>}>
              <ModuleManager />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'my-modules' && (
          <div className="my-modules-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading My Modules...</div>}>
              <ModuleDashboard />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'somatic' && (
          <div className="somatic-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Somatic Regulation...</div>}>
              <SomaticRegulation />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'breath' && (
          <div className="breath-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>🌬️ Loading Breath Engine...</div>}>
              <BreathEngine />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'sonic' && (
          <div className="sonic-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>🎵 Loading Sonic Shield...</div>}>
              <SonicShield />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'nerd-lab' && (
          <div className="nerd-lab-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>🧪 Loading Nerd Lab...</div>}>

          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'math' && (
          <div className="math-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Mathematics Dashboard...</div>}>

            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'story' && (
          <div className="story-tab">

          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'faq' && (
          <div className="faq-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading FAQ...</div>}>
              <FAQ />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'features' && (
          <div className="features-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Feature Showcase...</div>}>

            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'love-letter' && (
          <div className="love-letter-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Love Letter Protocol...</div>}>
              <LoveLetterProtocol />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'manifesto' && (
          <div className="manifesto-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>Loading Geodesic Manifesto...</div>}>
              <GeodesicManifesto />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'grimoire' && (
          <div className="grimoire-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>🌙 Loading The Grimoire...</div>}>
              <Grimoire />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'stars' && (
          <div className="stars-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>✨ Loading Family Constellation...</div>}>
              <FamilyConstellation />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'frequencies' && (
          <div className="frequencies-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>🎵 Loading The Frequencies...</div>}>
              <Frequencies />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'phenix' && (
          <div className="phenix-tab">
            <div style={{
              padding: '24px',
              textAlign: 'center',
              color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary,
            }}>
              <Shield size={48} color={GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.accent} style={{ marginBottom: 16 }} />
              <h2 style={{
                margin: '0 0 16px 0',
                color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary,
                fontSize: 20,
                fontWeight: 600,
              }}>
                PHENIX Companion
              </h2>
              <p style={{ margin: '0 0 24px 0', fontSize: 16 }}>
                Your prosthetic helper for ontological equilibrium, navigation, and integrated exchange.
              </p>
              <button
                onClick={() => {
                  triggerHapticPulse('medium');
                  setPhenixOpen(true);
                }}
                style={{
                  padding: '12px 24px',
                  backgroundColor: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.accent,
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  color: '#fff',
                  fontSize: 16,
                  fontWeight: 500,
                  cursor: 'pointer',
                  transition: 'all 0.2s ease',
                }}
              >
                Open PHENIX Companion
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'coherence-quest' && (
          <div className="coherence-quest-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>🎮 Loading Coherence Quest...</div>}>
              <CoherenceQuest />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'survival' && (
          <div className="survival-tab">
            <Suspense fallback={<div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>🆘 Loading Survival Guide...</div>}>
              <SurvivalGuide />
            </Suspense>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'about' && (
          <div className="about-tab">
            <div 
              style={{
                backgroundColor: GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.secondary,
                border: `1px solid ${GOD_CONFIG.theme.border.default}`,
                borderRadius: 12,
                padding: 24,
              }}
            >
              <h2 
                style={{
                  fontSize: 18,
                  fontWeight: 600,
                  fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
                  color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary,
                  marginTop: 0,
                  marginBottom: 16,
                }}
              >
                The Homebrew Protocol
              </h2>

              <div 
                style={{
                  color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary,
                  fontSize: 14,
                  lineHeight: 1.7,
                }}
              >
                <p>
                  <strong style={{ color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary }}>
                    The friction is not your fault.
                  </strong>
                </p>
                <p>
                  We are attempting to run a global, high-frequency, neurodiverse 
                  civilization on "Legacy Firmware" designed for small, homogeneous tribes. 
                  We are trying to push the voltage of the Internet through the copper 
                  wiring of the Stone Age brain.
                </p>

                <h3 
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 14,
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
                    color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.accent,
                    marginTop: 24,
                    marginBottom: 12,
                  }}
                >
                  The Three-Step Protocol
                </h3>

                <ol style={{ paddingLeft: 20, margin: 0 }}>
                  <li style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}>
                    <strong style={{ color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary }}>
                      Air Gap:
                    </strong>{' '}
                    Never read a high-stakes message directly. Copy it without reading.
                  </li>
                  <li style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}>
                    <strong style={{ color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary }}>
                      Universal Translator:
                    </strong>{' '}
                    Let the Shield process and translate to remove the "voltage."
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    <strong style={{ color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary }}>
                      Sanitized Response:
                    </strong>{' '}
                    Match your reply to their HumanOS for maximum absorption.
                  </li>
                </ol>

                <h3 
                  style={{
                    fontSize: 14,
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
                    color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.accent,
                    marginTop: 24,
                    marginBottom: 12,
                  }}
                >
                  The Tetrahedron Protocol
                </h3>

                <p>
                  The Cognitive Shield introduces the AI as the "Fourth Party," 
                  creating a <strong>Tetrahedron</strong>—the minimum stable structure:
                </p>

                <ul style={{ paddingLeft: 20, margin: '12px 0' }}>
                  <li><strong>Node A:</strong> You (The Receiver)</li>
                  <li><strong>Node B:</strong> Them (The Sender)</li>
                  <li><strong>Node C:</strong> The Context (Shared Reality)</li>
                  <li><strong>Node D:</strong> The AI (Mediator/Ground)</li>
                </ul>

                <p style={{ fontStyle: 'italic', marginTop: 24 }}>
                  "We do not need to change each other. We need to build the 
                  Universal Translation Layer that allows us to love each other 
                  across the impedance mismatch."
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Footer */}
        <footer 
          style={{
            marginTop: 48,
            textAlign: 'center',
            color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted,
            fontSize: 11,
            fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
          }}
        >
          <div style={{ marginBottom: 8 }}>
            COGNITIVE SHIELD v{GOD_CONFIG.version}
          </div>
          <div>
            Built on the <span style={{ color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.accent }}>Tetrahedron Protocol</span>
          </div>
        </footer>
      </div>

      {/* You Are Safe Modal - The Fourth Node */}
      <YouAreSafe
        isOpen={safeMenuOpen}
        onClose={() => {
          setSafeMenuOpen(false);
          setSafeMenuPayload(null);
        }}
        payload={safeMenuPayload || undefined}
      />

      {/* PHENIX Companion - The Prosthetic Interface */}
      <Suspense fallback={null}>
        <PhenixCompanion
          isOpen={phenixOpen}
          onClose={() => setPhenixOpen(false)}
          initialMode="ARCHITECT"
        />
      </Suspense>
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;


```

---

**User**

why do people need the app

they need to know

but you can't tell them

they have to figure it out

sights sounds

---

**Cursor**

```typescriptreact
/**
 * COGNITIVE FLOW - Experiential Discovery Through Sensory Intelligence
 * GOD Protocol: Zero Friction, Predictive Intelligence, Ambient Guidance
 *
 * Not telling users what they need - letting them discover through experience
 * Using sights, sounds, and subtle cues to create moments of insight
 * The garden reveals its beauty as you walk through it
 */

import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import {
  Shield, Brain, Heart, Sparkles, Activity, MessageCircle,
  Lightbulb, TrendingUp, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Zap,
  Wind, Music, Target, ChevronRight, ArrowRight, Clock,
  Battery, Thermometer, Wifi, WifiOff
} from 'lucide-react';
import GOD_CONFIG from '../god.config';
import useShieldStore from '../store/shield.store';
import useHeartbeatStore from '../stores/heartbeat.store';

type FlowState =
  | 'welcome'      // First time users
  | 'assessment'   // Reading user state
  | 'processing'   // Handling messages
  | 'regulation'   // Emotional regulation
  | 'creation'     // AI-assisted creation
  | 'growth'       // Personal development
  | 'maintenance'  // System maintenance
  | 'rest'         // Low energy state

type FlowPriority = 'critical' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | 'ambient'

interface FlowAction {
  id: string
  title: string
  description: string
  icon: React.ComponentType<any>
  priority: FlowPriority
  estimatedTime: number // minutes
  energyRequired: number // spoon cost
  benefits: string[]
  component?: React.ComponentType<any>
}

const FLOW_ACTIONS: Record<string, FlowAction> = {
  // Critical priority - immediate safety/response
  emergency_shield: {
    id: 'emergency_shield',
    title: 'Emergency Shield Activation',
    description: 'High-voltage situation detected. Activating immediate protection protocols.',
    icon: Shield,
    priority: 'critical',
    estimatedTime: 2,
    energyRequired: 5,
    benefits: ['Immediate emotional protection', 'Voltage regulation', 'Response guidance'],
  },

  message_processing: {
    id: 'message_processing',
    title: 'Safe Message Processing',
    description: 'You have messages waiting. Let\'s process them together safely.',
    icon: MessageCircle,
    priority: 'high',
    estimatedTime: 5,
    energyRequired: 15,
    benefits: ['Safe communication', 'Emotional intelligence', 'Clear responses'],
  },

  // High priority - immediate needs
  energy_recovery: {
    id: 'energy_recovery',
    title: 'Energy Recovery Protocol',
    description: 'Your energy levels are low. Let\'s restore your reserves.',
    icon: Battery,
    priority: 'high',
    estimatedTime: 10,
    energyRequired: -20, // Actually restores energy
    benefits: ['Energy restoration', 'Somatic regulation', 'Sustainable pacing'],
  },

  voltage_calibration: {
    id: 'voltage_calibration',
    title: 'Voltage Calibration',
    description: 'Emotional intensity detected. Let\'s find your optimal processing level.',
    icon: Thermometer,
    priority: 'high',
    estimatedTime: 3,
    energyRequired: 8,
    benefits: ['Emotional regulation', 'Processing optimization', 'Stress reduction'],
  },

  // Medium priority - developmental
  phenix_conversation: {
    id: 'phenix_conversation',
    title: 'PHENIX Conversation',
    description: 'Your AI companion is here to help with whatever you\'re navigating.',
    icon: Brain,
    priority: 'medium',
    estimatedTime: 15,
    energyRequired: 25,
    benefits: ['Emotional support', 'Problem solving', 'Perspective expansion'],
  },

  creative_exploration: {
    id: 'creative_exploration',
    title: 'Creative Exploration',
    description: 'Great energy levels! Let\'s explore something new together.',
    icon: Lightbulb,
    priority: 'medium',
    estimatedTime: 20,
    energyRequired: 30,
    benefits: ['Creative discovery', 'Skill development', 'Joy cultivation'],
  },

  relationship_modeling: {
    id: 'relationship_modeling',
    title: 'Relationship Intelligence',
    description: 'Using mathematics to understand and improve your relationships.',
    icon: TrendingUp,
    priority: 'medium',
    estimatedTime: 12,
    energyRequired: 20,
    benefits: ['Relationship clarity', 'Communication improvement', 'Conflict resolution'],
  },

  // Low priority - maintenance/background
  system_optimization: {
    id: 'system_optimization',
    title: 'System Optimization',
    description: 'Fine-tuning your cognitive tools for optimal performance.',
    icon: Target,
    priority: 'low',
    estimatedTime: 8,
    energyRequired: 12,
    benefits: ['Performance improvement', 'Tool optimization', 'Efficiency gains'],
  },

  knowledge_expansion: {
    id: 'knowledge_expansion',
    title: 'Knowledge Expansion',
    description: 'Exploring new concepts and understanding the universe better.',
    icon: Sparkles,
    priority: 'low',
    estimatedTime: 25,
    energyRequired: 35,
    benefits: ['Intellectual growth', 'Perspective broadening', 'Wisdom development'],
  }
};

interface CognitiveFlowProps {
  className?: string;
  onFlowAction?: (actionId: string) => void;
}

export default function CognitiveFlow({ className = '', onFlowAction }: CognitiveFlowProps) {
  const [currentFlow, setCurrentFlow] = useState<FlowState>('assessment');
  const [flowHistory, setFlowHistory] = useState<FlowState[]>([]);
  const [isTransitioning, setIsTransitioning] = useState(false);

  // Get real-time user state
  const { operator } = useHeartbeatStore();
  const { processedPayload, voltage, buffer } = useShieldStore();

  const userState = useMemo(() => ({
    spoons: operator.spoons,
    maxSpoons: operator.maxSpoons,
    voltage: voltage,
    hasUnprocessedMessages: buffer.length > 0,
    isNewUser: !processedPayload && operator.lastCheckIn.getTime() > Date.now() - (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),
    lastCheckIn: operator.lastCheckIn,
    heartbeat: operator.heartbeat,
    stressLevel: (operator.stressIndicators.physicalTension +
                  operator.stressIndicators.mentalLoad +
                  operator.stressIndicators.emotionalState) / 3
  }), [operator, processedPayload, voltage, buffer]);

  // AI-powered flow determination using mathematical models
  const determineOptimalFlow = useCallback((): FlowState => {
    const { spoons, voltage, hasUnprocessedMessages, isNewUser, stressLevel } = userState;

    // Critical safety first
    if (voltage > 8 || stressLevel > 7) return 'regulation';
    if (hasUnprocessedMessages && voltage > 6) return 'processing';

    // Energy management
    if (spoons < 30) return 'rest';
    if (spoons < 50) return 'regulation';

    // New user onboarding
    if (isNewUser) return 'welcome';

    // Active processing needed
    if (hasUnprocessedMessages) return 'processing';

    // High energy = growth opportunities
    if (spoons > 80) return 'growth';

    // Maintenance and optimization
    if (spoons > 60) return 'creation';

    return 'maintenance';
  }, [userState]);

  // Get recommended actions for current flow
  const getRecommendedActions = useCallback((flow: FlowState): FlowAction[] => {
    const { spoons, voltage, hasUnprocessedMessages, stressLevel } = userState;

    switch (flow) {
      case 'welcome':
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.phenix_conversation];

      case 'processing':
        return hasUnprocessedMessages ? [FLOW_ACTIONS.message_processing] : [];

      case 'regulation':
        if (voltage > 7) return [FLOW_ACTIONS.voltage_calibration];
        if (spoons < 40) return [FLOW_ACTIONS.energy_recovery];
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.energy_recovery];

      case 'creation':
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.phenix_conversation, FLOW_ACTIONS.creative_exploration];

      case 'growth':
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.relationship_modeling, FLOW_ACTIONS.knowledge_expansion];

      case 'maintenance':
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.system_optimization];

      case 'rest':
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.energy_recovery];

      default:
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.phenix_conversation];
    }
  }, [userState]);

  // Seamless flow transitions
  const transitionToFlow = useCallback((newFlow: FlowState) => {
    if (newFlow === currentFlow) return;

    setIsTransitioning(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setFlowHistory(prev => [...prev, currentFlow]);
      setCurrentFlow(newFlow);
      setIsTransitioning(false);
    }, 300);
  }, [currentFlow]);

  // Auto-flow based on state changes
  useEffect(() => {
    const optimalFlow = determineOptimalFlow();
    if (optimalFlow !== currentFlow && !isTransitioning) {
      transitionToFlow(optimalFlow);
    }
  }, [userState, determineOptimalFlow, currentFlow, isTransitioning, transitionToFlow]);

  // Auto-execute high-priority actions
  useEffect(() => {
    const actions = getRecommendedActions(currentFlow);
    const criticalAction = actions.find(a => a.priority === 'critical');

    if (criticalAction && onFlowAction) {
      // Auto-execute critical actions after brief delay
      setTimeout(() => {
        onFlowAction(criticalAction.id);
      }, 1000);
    }
  }, [currentFlow, getRecommendedActions, onFlowAction]);

  const currentActions = getRecommendedActions(currentFlow);
  const primaryAction = currentActions[0];
  const secondaryActions = currentActions.slice(1);

  // Flow state descriptions
  const flowDescriptions = {
    welcome: "Welcome to Cognitive Shield. Let's get you oriented and comfortable.",
    assessment: "Reading your current state to provide the optimal experience...",
    processing: "Safely processing your messages with emotional intelligence.",
    regulation: "Supporting your nervous system regulation and energy management.",
    creation: "Exploring creative possibilities and AI-assisted problem solving.",
    growth: "Fostering personal development and relationship intelligence.",
    maintenance: "Optimizing your cognitive tools and system performance.",
    rest: "Supporting your recovery and sustainable energy management."
  };

  const flowColors = {
    welcome: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.accent,
    assessment: '#6b7280',
    processing: '#3b82f6',
    regulation: '#22c55e',
    creation: '#8b5cf6',
    growth: '#f59e0b',
    maintenance: '#06b6d4',
    rest: '#64748b'
  };

  return (
    <div className={`cognitive-flow ${className}`} style={{
      width: '100%',
      minHeight: '200px',
      background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.secondary} 0%, ${GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.primary} 100%)`,
      borderRadius: '16px',
      padding: '24px',
      border: `1px solid ${GOD_CONFIG.theme.border.default}`,
      boxShadow: '0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)',
      position: 'relative',
      overflow: 'hidden',
      transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
    }}>

      {/* Ambient Flow Indicator */}
      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        top: '16px',
        right: '16px',
        display: 'flex',
        alignItems: 'center',
        gap: '8px',
        backgroundColor: `${flowColors[currentFlow]}20`,
        padding: '6px 12px',
        borderRadius: '20px',
        border: `1px solid ${flowColors[currentFlow]}40`,
      }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '8px',
          height: '8px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: flowColors[currentFlow],
          animation: 'pulse 2s infinite',
        }} />
        <span style={{
          fontSize: '12px',
          fontWeight: 500,
          color: flowColors[currentFlow],
          textTransform: 'capitalize',
        }}>
          {currentFlow}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Seamless Flow Content */}
      <div style={{
        opacity: isTransitioning ? 0.3 : 1,
        transform: isTransitioning ? 'translateY(-10px)' : 'translateY(0)',
        transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
      }}>

        {/* Flow Header */}
        <div style={{ marginBottom: '24px' }}>
          <h2 style={{
            margin: '0 0 8px 0',
            fontSize: '20px',
            fontWeight: 700,
            color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary,
            fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
          }}>
            {currentFlow === 'welcome' && '🌟 Welcome to Cognitive Shield'}
            {currentFlow === 'assessment' && '🔍 Reading Your State'}
            {currentFlow === 'processing' && '🛡️ Safe Message Processing'}
            {currentFlow === 'regulation' && '💚 Energy & Emotion Regulation'}
            {currentFlow === 'creation' && '🎨 Creative Exploration'}
            {currentFlow === 'growth' && '🌱 Personal Growth'}
            {currentFlow === 'maintenance' && '⚙️ System Optimization'}
            {currentFlow === 'rest' && '😌 Rest & Recovery'}
          </h2>

          <p style={{
            margin: 0,
            fontSize: '14px',
            color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary,
            lineHeight: 1.5,
            maxWidth: '600px',
          }}>
            {flowDescriptions[currentFlow]}
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Primary Action (Auto-Recommended) */}
        {primaryAction && (
          <div style={{
            backgroundColor: `${flowColors[currentFlow]}15`,
            border: `2px solid ${flowColors[currentFlow]}40`,
            borderRadius: '16px',
            padding: '20px',
            marginBottom: '16px',
            position: 'relative',
          }}>
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: '16px' }}>
              <div style={{
                width: '48px',
                height: '48px',
                borderRadius: '12px',
                backgroundColor: `${flowColors[currentFlow]}30`,
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                justifyContent: 'center',
                flexShrink: 0,
              }}>
                <primaryAction.icon size={24} color={flowColors[currentFlow]} />
              </div>

              <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
                  <h3 style={{
                    margin: 0,
                    fontSize: '16px',
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary,
                  }}>
                    {primaryAction.title}
                  </h3>
                  {primaryAction.priority === 'critical' && (
                    <span style={{
                      padding: '2px 8px',
                      backgroundColor: '#ef4444',
                      color: '#fff',
                      borderRadius: '12px',
                      fontSize: '11px',
                      fontWeight: 600,
                      textTransform: 'uppercase',
                    }}>
                      Priority
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>

                <p style={{
                  margin: '0 0 12px 0',
                  fontSize: '14px',
                  color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary,
                  lineHeight: 1.5,
                }}>
                  {primaryAction.description}
                </p>

                <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '16px', marginBottom: '12px' }}>
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '4px' }}>
                    <Clock size={14} color={GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted} />
                    <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted }}>
                      {primaryAction.estimatedTime} min
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '4px' }}>
                    <Activity size={14} color={
                      primaryAction.energyRequired > 0 ? '#ef4444' :
                      primaryAction.energyRequired < 0 ? '#22c55e' : GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted
                    } />
                    <span style={{
                      fontSize: '12px',
                      color: primaryAction.energyRequired > 0 ? '#ef4444' :
                             primaryAction.energyRequired < 0 ? '#22c55e' : GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted
                    }}>
                      {primaryAction.energyRequired > 0 ? `-${primaryAction.energyRequired}` :
                       primaryAction.energyRequired < 0 ? `+${Math.abs(primaryAction.energyRequired)}` : '0'} spoons
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '6px' }}>
                  {primaryAction.benefits.map((benefit, index) => (
                    <span key={index} style={{
                      padding: '4px 8px',
                      backgroundColor: `${flowColors[currentFlow]}25`,
                      color: flowColors[currentFlow],
                      borderRadius: '12px',
                      fontSize: '11px',
                      fontWeight: 500,
                    }}>
                      {benefit}
                    </span>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              <button
                onClick={() => onFlowAction?.(primaryAction.id)}
                style={{
                  padding: '12px',
                  backgroundColor: flowColors[currentFlow],
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: '12px',
                  color: '#fff',
                  cursor: 'pointer',
                  transition: 'all 0.2s ease',
                  flexShrink: 0,
                }}
                onMouseEnter={(e) => {
                  e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'scale(1.05)';
                  e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = `0 4px 16px ${flowColors[currentFlow]}60`;
                }}
                onMouseLeave={(e) => {
                  e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
                  e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = 'none';
                }}
              >
                <ArrowRight size={20} />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Secondary Actions */}
        {secondaryActions.length > 0 && (
          <div>
            <h4 style={{
              margin: '0 0 12px 0',
              fontSize: '14px',
              fontWeight: 600,
              color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary,
              textTransform: 'uppercase',
              letterSpacing: '0.5px',
            }}>
              Also Available
            </h4>

            <div style={{
              display: 'grid',
              gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr))',
              gap: '12px',
            }}>
              {secondaryActions.map((action) => (
                <button
                  key={action.id}
                  onClick={() => onFlowAction?.(action.id)}
                  style={{
                    display: 'flex',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    gap: '12px',
                    padding: '16px',
                    backgroundColor: GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.primary,
                    border: `1px solid ${GOD_CONFIG.theme.border.default}`,
                    borderRadius: '12px',
                    cursor: 'pointer',
                    transition: 'all 0.2s ease',
                    textAlign: 'left',
                  }}
                  onMouseEnter={(e) => {
                    e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = flowColors[currentFlow];
                    e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(-2px)';
                    e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)';
                  }}
                  onMouseLeave={(e) => {
                    e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = GOD_CONFIG.theme.border.default;
                    e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
                    e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = 'none';
                  }}
                >
                  <action.icon size={20} color={GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary} />
                  <div>
                    <div style={{
                      fontSize: '14px',
                      fontWeight: 500,
                      color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary,
                      marginBottom: '2px',
                    }}>
                      {action.title}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{
                      fontSize: '12px',
                      color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary,
                    }}>
                      {action.estimatedTime} min • {action.energyRequired > 0 ? '-' : '+'}{Math.abs(action.energyRequired)} spoons
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <ChevronRight size={16} color={GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted} style={{ marginLeft: 'auto' }} />
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Flow Status Indicators */}
        <div style={{
          marginTop: '20px',
          padding: '12px',
          backgroundColor: GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.tertiary,
          borderRadius: '8px',
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          gap: '16px',
          flexWrap: 'wrap',
        }}>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px' }}>
            <Battery size={16} color={
              userState.spoons > 60 ? '#22c55e' :
              userState.spoons > 30 ? '#f59e0b' : '#ef4444'
            } />
            <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>
              Energy: {userState.spoons}/{userState.maxSpoons}
            </span>
          </div>

          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px' }}>
            <Thermometer size={16} color={
              userState.voltage < 4 ? '#22c55e' :
              userState.voltage < 7 ? '#f59e0b' : '#ef4444'
            } />
            <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>
              Voltage: {userState.voltage.toFixed(1)}
            </span>
          </div>

          {userState.hasUnprocessedMessages && (
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px' }}>
              <MessageCircle size={16} color="#3b82f6" />
              <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>
                Messages waiting
              </span>
            </div>
          )}

          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px', marginLeft: 'auto' }}>
            <Wifi size={16} color={
              navigator.onLine ? '#22c55e' : '#ef4444'
            } />
            <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>
              {navigator.onLine ? 'Online' : 'Offline'}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Ambient Flow Animation */}
      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        top: 0,
        left: 0,
        right: 0,
        bottom: 0,
        pointerEvents: 'none',
        opacity: 0.03,
        background: `radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, ${flowColors[currentFlow]} 0%, transparent 50%),
                    radial-gradient(circle at 80% 70%, ${flowColors[currentFlow]} 0%, transparent 50%)`,
        animation: 'flow 8s ease-in-out infinite',
      }} />

      <style jsx>{`
        @keyframes flow {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 0.03; }
          50% { opacity: 0.08; }
        }

        @keyframes pulse {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
          50% { opacity: 0.6; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescriptreact
/**
 * COGNITIVE FLOW - Experiential Discovery Through Sensory Intelligence
 * GOD Protocol: Zero Friction, Predictive Intelligence, Ambient Guidance
 *
 * Not telling users what they need - letting them discover through experience
 * Using sights, sounds, and subtle cues to create moments of insight
 * The garden reveals its beauty as you walk through it
 */

import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import {
  Shield, Brain, Heart, Sparkles, Activity, MessageCircle,
  Lightbulb, TrendingUp, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Zap,
  Wind, Music, Target, ChevronRight, ArrowRight, Clock,
  Battery, Thermometer, Wifi, WifiOff
} from 'lucide-react';
import GOD_CONFIG from '../god.config';
import useShieldStore from '../store/shield.store';
import useHeartbeatStore from '../stores/heartbeat.store';

type FlowState =
  | 'welcome'      // First time users
  | 'assessment'   // Reading user state
  | 'processing'   // Handling messages
  | 'regulation'   // Emotional regulation
  | 'creation'     // AI-assisted creation
  | 'growth'       // Personal development
  | 'maintenance'  // System maintenance
  | 'rest'         // Low energy state

type FlowPriority = 'critical' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | 'ambient'

interface FlowAction {
  id: string
  title: string
  description: string
  icon: React.ComponentType<any>
  priority: FlowPriority
  estimatedTime: number // minutes
  energyRequired: number // spoon cost
  benefits: string[]
  component?: React.ComponentType<any>
}

// Experiential flow actions - discovered through interaction, not explanation
const FLOW_ACTIONS: Record<string, FlowAction> = {
  // Sensory experiences that users discover
  gentle_wave: {
    id: 'gentle_wave',
    title: 'A Gentle Wave',
    description: 'Soft patterns moving through the space...',
    icon: Shield,
    priority: 'critical',
    estimatedTime: 2,
    energyRequired: 5,
    benefits: [], // Let them discover
  },

  quiet_space: {
    id: 'quiet_space',
    title: 'The Quiet Space',
    description: 'Messages waiting in soft light...',
    icon: MessageCircle,
    priority: 'high',
    estimatedTime: 5,
    energyRequired: 15,
    benefits: [], // Experience reveals
  },

  warm_light: {
    id: 'warm_light',
    title: 'Warm Light',
    description: 'A gentle glow fills the space...',
    icon: Battery,
    priority: 'high',
    estimatedTime: 10,
    energyRequired: -20,
    benefits: [], // Discovery through feeling
  },

  steady_rhythm: {
    id: 'steady_rhythm',
    title: 'Steady Rhythm',
    description: 'Finding the natural cadence...',
    icon: Thermometer,
    priority: 'high',
    estimatedTime: 3,
    energyRequired: 8,
    benefits: [], // Experienced, not explained
  },

  curious_whisper: {
    id: 'curious_whisper',
    title: 'A Curious Whisper',
    description: 'Something intriguing calls...',
    icon: Brain,
    priority: 'medium',
    estimatedTime: 15,
    energyRequired: 25,
    benefits: [], // Let curiosity guide
  },

  dancing_colors: {
    id: 'dancing_colors',
    title: 'Dancing Colors',
    description: 'Light plays across the surface...',
    icon: Lightbulb,
    priority: 'medium',
    estimatedTime: 20,
    energyRequired: 30,
    benefits: [], // Beauty in motion
  },

  golden_threads: {
    id: 'golden_threads',
    title: 'Golden Threads',
    description: 'Connections weaving through space...',
    icon: TrendingUp,
    priority: 'medium',
    estimatedTime: 12,
    energyRequired: 20,
    benefits: [], // Patterns emerge
  },

  crystal_clarity: {
    id: 'crystal_clarity',
    title: 'Crystal Clarity',
    description: 'Everything comes into perfect focus...',
    icon: Target,
    priority: 'low',
    estimatedTime: 8,
    energyRequired: 12,
    benefits: [], // Clear sight
  },

  infinite_expanse: {
    id: 'infinite_expanse',
    title: 'Infinite Expanse',
    description: 'Endless possibilities unfold...',
    icon: Sparkles,
    priority: 'low',
    estimatedTime: 25,
    energyRequired: 35,
    benefits: [], // Boundless discovery
  }
};

interface CognitiveFlowProps {
  className?: string;
  onFlowAction?: (actionId: string) => void;
}

export default function CognitiveFlow({ className = '', onFlowAction }: CognitiveFlowProps) {
  const [currentFlow, setCurrentFlow] = useState<FlowState>('assessment');
  const [flowHistory, setFlowHistory] = useState<FlowState[]>([]);
  const [isTransitioning, setIsTransitioning] = useState(false);

  // Get real-time user state
  const { operator } = useHeartbeatStore();
  const { processedPayload, voltage, buffer } = useShieldStore();

  const userState = useMemo(() => ({
    spoons: operator.spoons,
    maxSpoons: operator.maxSpoons,
    voltage: voltage,
    hasUnprocessedMessages: buffer.length > 0,
    isNewUser: !processedPayload && operator.lastCheckIn.getTime() > Date.now() - (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),
    lastCheckIn: operator.lastCheckIn,
    heartbeat: operator.heartbeat,
    stressLevel: (operator.stressIndicators.physicalTension +
                  operator.stressIndicators.mentalLoad +
                  operator.stressIndicators.emotionalState) / 3
  }), [operator, processedPayload, voltage, buffer]);

  // AI-powered flow determination using mathematical models
  const determineOptimalFlow = useCallback((): FlowState => {
    const { spoons, voltage, hasUnprocessedMessages, isNewUser, stressLevel } = userState;

    // Critical safety first
    if (voltage > 8 || stressLevel > 7) return 'regulation';
    if (hasUnprocessedMessages && voltage > 6) return 'processing';

    // Energy management
    if (spoons < 30) return 'rest';
    if (spoons < 50) return 'regulation';

    // New user onboarding
    if (isNewUser) return 'welcome';

    // Active processing needed
    if (hasUnprocessedMessages) return 'processing';

    // High energy = growth opportunities
    if (spoons > 80) return 'growth';

    // Maintenance and optimization
    if (spoons > 60) return 'creation';

    return 'maintenance';
  }, [userState]);

  // Get recommended actions for current flow
  const getRecommendedActions = useCallback((flow: FlowState): FlowAction[] => {
    const { spoons, voltage, hasUnprocessedMessages, stressLevel } = userState;

    switch (flow) {
      case 'welcome':
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.phenix_conversation];

      case 'processing':
        return hasUnprocessedMessages ? [FLOW_ACTIONS.message_processing] : [];

      case 'regulation':
        if (voltage > 7) return [FLOW_ACTIONS.voltage_calibration];
        if (spoons < 40) return [FLOW_ACTIONS.energy_recovery];
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.energy_recovery];

      case 'creation':
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.phenix_conversation, FLOW_ACTIONS.creative_exploration];

      case 'growth':
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.relationship_modeling, FLOW_ACTIONS.knowledge_expansion];

      case 'maintenance':
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.system_optimization];

      case 'rest':
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.energy_recovery];

      default:
        return [FLOW_ACTIONS.phenix_conversation];
    }
  }, [userState]);

  // Seamless flow transitions
  const transitionToFlow = useCallback((newFlow: FlowState) => {
    if (newFlow === currentFlow) return;

    setIsTransitioning(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setFlowHistory(prev => [...prev, currentFlow]);
      setCurrentFlow(newFlow);
      setIsTransitioning(false);
    }, 300);
  }, [currentFlow]);

  // Auto-flow based on state changes
  useEffect(() => {
    const optimalFlow = determineOptimalFlow();
    if (optimalFlow !== currentFlow && !isTransitioning) {
      transitionToFlow(optimalFlow);
    }
  }, [userState, determineOptimalFlow, currentFlow, isTransitioning, transitionToFlow]);

  // Auto-execute high-priority actions
  useEffect(() => {
    const actions = getRecommendedActions(currentFlow);
    const criticalAction = actions.find(a => a.priority === 'critical');

    if (criticalAction && onFlowAction) {
      // Auto-execute critical actions after brief delay
      setTimeout(() => {
        onFlowAction(criticalAction.id);
      }, 1000);
    }
  }, [currentFlow, getRecommendedActions, onFlowAction]);

  const currentActions = getRecommendedActions(currentFlow);
  const primaryAction = currentActions[0];
  const secondaryActions = currentActions.slice(1);

  // Flow state descriptions
  const flowDescriptions = {
    welcome: "Welcome to Cognitive Shield. Let's get you oriented and comfortable.",
    assessment: "Reading your current state to provide the optimal experience...",
    processing: "Safely processing your messages with emotional intelligence.",
    regulation: "Supporting your nervous system regulation and energy management.",
    creation: "Exploring creative possibilities and AI-assisted problem solving.",
    growth: "Fostering personal development and relationship intelligence.",
    maintenance: "Optimizing your cognitive tools and system performance.",
    rest: "Supporting your recovery and sustainable energy management."
  };

  const flowColors = {
    welcome: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.accent,
    assessment: '#6b7280',
    processing: '#3b82f6',
    regulation: '#22c55e',
    creation: '#8b5cf6',
    growth: '#f59e0b',
    maintenance: '#06b6d4',
    rest: '#64748b'
  };

  return (
    <div className={`cognitive-flow ${className}`} style={{
      width: '100%',
      minHeight: '200px',
      background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.secondary} 0%, ${GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.primary} 100%)`,
      borderRadius: '16px',
      padding: '24px',
      border: `1px solid ${GOD_CONFIG.theme.border.default}`,
      boxShadow: '0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)',
      position: 'relative',
      overflow: 'hidden',
      transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
    }}>

      {/* Ambient Flow Indicator */}
      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        top: '16px',
        right: '16px',
        display: 'flex',
        alignItems: 'center',
        gap: '8px',
        backgroundColor: `${flowColors[currentFlow]}20`,
        padding: '6px 12px',
        borderRadius: '20px',
        border: `1px solid ${flowColors[currentFlow]}40`,
      }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '8px',
          height: '8px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: flowColors[currentFlow],
          animation: 'pulse 2s infinite',
        }} />
        <span style={{
          fontSize: '12px',
          fontWeight: 500,
          color: flowColors[currentFlow],
          textTransform: 'capitalize',
        }}>
          {currentFlow}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Seamless Flow Content */}
      <div style={{
        opacity: isTransitioning ? 0.3 : 1,
        transform: isTransitioning ? 'translateY(-10px)' : 'translateY(0)',
        transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
      }}>

        {/* Flow Header */}
        <div style={{ marginBottom: '24px' }}>
          <h2 style={{
            margin: '0 0 8px 0',
            fontSize: '20px',
            fontWeight: 700,
            color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary,
            fontFamily: GOD_CONFIG.typography.fontFamily.display,
          }}>
            {currentFlow === 'welcome' && '🌟 Welcome to Cognitive Shield'}
            {currentFlow === 'assessment' && '🔍 Reading Your State'}
            {currentFlow === 'processing' && '🛡️ Safe Message Processing'}
            {currentFlow === 'regulation' && '💚 Energy & Emotion Regulation'}
            {currentFlow === 'creation' && '🎨 Creative Exploration'}
            {currentFlow === 'growth' && '🌱 Personal Growth'}
            {currentFlow === 'maintenance' && '⚙️ System Optimization'}
            {currentFlow === 'rest' && '😌 Rest & Recovery'}
          </h2>

          <p style={{
            margin: 0,
            fontSize: '14px',
            color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary,
            lineHeight: 1.5,
            maxWidth: '600px',
          }}>
            {flowDescriptions[currentFlow]}
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Primary Action (Auto-Recommended) */}
        {primaryAction && (
          <div style={{
            backgroundColor: `${flowColors[currentFlow]}15`,
            border: `2px solid ${flowColors[currentFlow]}40`,
            borderRadius: '16px',
            padding: '20px',
            marginBottom: '16px',
            position: 'relative',
          }}>
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: '16px' }}>
              <div style={{
                width: '48px',
                height: '48px',
                borderRadius: '12px',
                backgroundColor: `${flowColors[currentFlow]}30`,
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                justifyContent: 'center',
                flexShrink: 0,
              }}>
                <primaryAction.icon size={24} color={flowColors[currentFlow]} />
              </div>

              <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
                  <h3 style={{
                    margin: 0,
                    fontSize: '16px',
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary,
                  }}>
                    {primaryAction.title}
                  </h3>
                  {primaryAction.priority === 'critical' && (
                    <span style={{
                      padding: '2px 8px',
                      backgroundColor: '#ef4444',
                      color: '#fff',
                      borderRadius: '12px',
                      fontSize: '11px',
                      fontWeight: 600,
                      textTransform: 'uppercase',
                    }}>
                      Priority
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>

                <p style={{
                  margin: '0 0 12px 0',
                  fontSize: '14px',
                  color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary,
                  lineHeight: 1.5,
                }}>
                  {primaryAction.description}
                </p>

                <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '16px', marginBottom: '12px' }}>
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '4px' }}>
                    <Clock size={14} color={GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted} />
                    <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted }}>
                      {primaryAction.estimatedTime} min
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '4px' }}>
                    <Activity size={14} color={
                      primaryAction.energyRequired > 0 ? '#ef4444' :
                      primaryAction.energyRequired < 0 ? '#22c55e' : GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted
                    } />
                    <span style={{
                      fontSize: '12px',
                      color: primaryAction.energyRequired > 0 ? '#ef4444' :
                             primaryAction.energyRequired < 0 ? '#22c55e' : GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted
                    }}>
                      {primaryAction.energyRequired > 0 ? `-${primaryAction.energyRequired}` :
                       primaryAction.energyRequired < 0 ? `+${Math.abs(primaryAction.energyRequired)}` : '0'} spoons
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '6px' }}>
                  {primaryAction.benefits.map((benefit, index) => (
                    <span key={index} style={{
                      padding: '4px 8px',
                      backgroundColor: `${flowColors[currentFlow]}25`,
                      color: flowColors[currentFlow],
                      borderRadius: '12px',
                      fontSize: '11px',
                      fontWeight: 500,
                    }}>
                      {benefit}
                    </span>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              <button
                onClick={() => onFlowAction?.(primaryAction.id)}
                style={{
                  padding: '12px',
                  backgroundColor: flowColors[currentFlow],
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: '12px',
                  color: '#fff',
                  cursor: 'pointer',
                  transition: 'all 0.2s ease',
                  flexShrink: 0,
                }}
                onMouseEnter={(e) => {
                  e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'scale(1.05)';
                  e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = `0 4px 16px ${flowColors[currentFlow]}60`;
                }}
                onMouseLeave={(e) => {
                  e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
                  e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = 'none';
                }}
              >
                <ArrowRight size={20} />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Secondary Actions */}
        {secondaryActions.length > 0 && (
          <div>
            <h4 style={{
              margin: '0 0 12px 0',
              fontSize: '14px',
              fontWeight: 600,
              color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary,
              textTransform: 'uppercase',
              letterSpacing: '0.5px',
            }}>
              Also Available
            </h4>

            <div style={{
              display: 'grid',
              gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr))',
              gap: '12px',
            }}>
              {secondaryActions.map((action) => (
                <button
                  key={action.id}
                  onClick={() => onFlowAction?.(action.id)}
                  style={{
                    display: 'flex',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    gap: '12px',
                    padding: '16px',
                    backgroundColor: GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.primary,
                    border: `1px solid ${GOD_CONFIG.theme.border.default}`,
                    borderRadius: '12px',
                    cursor: 'pointer',
                    transition: 'all 0.2s ease',
                    textAlign: 'left',
                  }}
                  onMouseEnter={(e) => {
                    e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = flowColors[currentFlow];
                    e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(-2px)';
                    e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)';
                  }}
                  onMouseLeave={(e) => {
                    e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = GOD_CONFIG.theme.border.default;
                    e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
                    e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = 'none';
                  }}
                >
                  <action.icon size={20} color={GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary} />
                  <div>
                    <div style={{
                      fontSize: '14px',
                      fontWeight: 500,
                      color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.primary,
                      marginBottom: '2px',
                    }}>
                      {action.title}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{
                      fontSize: '12px',
                      color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary,
                    }}>
                      {action.estimatedTime} min • {action.energyRequired > 0 ? '-' : '+'}{Math.abs(action.energyRequired)} spoons
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <ChevronRight size={16} color={GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.muted} style={{ marginLeft: 'auto' }} />
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Flow Status Indicators */}
        <div style={{
          marginTop: '20px',
          padding: '12px',
          backgroundColor: GOD_CONFIG.theme.bg.tertiary,
          borderRadius: '8px',
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          gap: '16px',
          flexWrap: 'wrap',
        }}>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px' }}>
            <Battery size={16} color={
              userState.spoons > 60 ? '#22c55e' :
              userState.spoons > 30 ? '#f59e0b' : '#ef4444'
            } />
            <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>
              Energy: {userState.spoons}/{userState.maxSpoons}
            </span>
          </div>

          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px' }}>
            <Thermometer size={16} color={
              userState.voltage < 4 ? '#22c55e' :
              userState.voltage < 7 ? '#f59e0b' : '#ef4444'
            } />
            <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>
              Voltage: {userState.voltage.toFixed(1)}
            </span>
          </div>

          {userState.hasUnprocessedMessages && (
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px' }}>
              <MessageCircle size={16} color="#3b82f6" />
              <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>
                Messages waiting
              </span>
            </div>
          )}

          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px', marginLeft: 'auto' }}>
            <Wifi size={16} color={
              navigator.onLine ? '#22c55e' : '#ef4444'
            } />
            <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: GOD_CONFIG.theme.text.secondary }}>
              {navigator.onLine ? 'Online' : 'Offline'}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Ambient Flow Animation */}
      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        top: 0,
        left: 0,
        right: 0,
        bottom: 0,
        pointerEvents: 'none',
        opacity: 0.03,
        background: `radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, ${flowColors[currentFlow]} 0%, transparent 50%),
                    radial-gradient(circle at 80% 70%, ${flowColors[currentFlow]} 0%, transparent 50%)`,
        animation: 'flow 8s ease-in-out infinite',
      }} />

      <style jsx>{`
        @keyframes flow {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 0.03; }
          50% { opacity: 0.08; }
        }

        @keyframes pulse {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
          50% { opacity: 0.6; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescriptreact
/**
 * COGNITIVE FLOW - Experiential Discovery Through Sensory Intelligence
 * GOD Protocol: Zero Friction, Predictive Intelligence, Ambient Guidance
 *
 * Not telling users what they need - letting them discover through experience
 * Using sights, sounds, and subtle cues to create moments of insight
 * The garden reveals its beauty as you walk through it
 */

import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import {
  Shield, Brain, Heart, Sparkles, Activity, MessageCircle,
  Lightbulb, TrendingUp, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Zap,
  Wind, Music, Target, ChevronRight, ArrowRight, Clock,
  Battery, Thermometer, Wifi, WifiOff
} from 'lucide-react';
import GOD_CONFIG from '../god.config';
import useShieldStore from '../store/shield.store';
import useHeartbeatStore from '../stores/heartbeat.store';

type FlowState =
  | 'welcome'      // First time users
  | 'assessment'   // Reading user state
  | 'processing'   // Handling messages
  | 'regulation'   // Emotional regulation
  | 'creation'     // AI-assisted creation
  | 'growth'       // Personal development
  | 'maintenance'  // System maintenance
  | 'rest'         // Low energy state

type FlowPriority = 'critical' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | 'ambient'

interface FlowAction {
  id: string
  title: string
  description: string
  icon: React.ComponentType<any>
  priority: FlowPriority
  estimatedTime: number // minutes
  energyRequired: number // spoon cost
  benefits: string[]
  component?: React.ComponentType<any>
}

// Experiential flow actions - discovered through interaction, not explanation
const FLOW_ACTIONS: Record<string, FlowAction> = {
  // Sensory experiences that users discover
  gentle_wave: {
    id: 'gentle_wave',
    title: 'A Gentle Wave',
    description: 'Soft patterns moving through the space...',
    icon: Shield,
    priority: 'critical',
    estimatedTime: 2,
    energyRequired: 5,
    benefits: [], // Let them discover
  },

  quiet_space: {
    id: 'quiet_space',
    title: 'The Quiet Space',
    description: 'Messages waiting in soft light...',
    icon: MessageCircle,
    priority: 'high',
    estimatedTime: 5,
    energyRequired: 15,
    benefits: [], // Experience reveals
  },

  warm_light: {
    id: 'warm_light',
    title: 'Warm Light',
    description: 'A gentle glow fills the space...',
    icon: Battery,
    priority: 'high',
    estimatedTime: 10,
    energyRequired: -20,
    benefits: [], // Discovery through feeling
  },

  steady_rhythm: {
    id: 'steady_rhythm',
    title: 'Steady Rhythm',
    description: 'Finding the natural cadence...',
    icon: Thermometer,
    priority: 'high',
    estimatedTime: 3,
    energyRequired: 8,
    benefits: [], // Experienced, not explained
  },

  curious_whisper: {
    id: 'curious_whisper',
    title: 'A Curious Whisper',
    description: 'Something intriguing calls...',
    icon: Brain,
    priority: 'medium',
    estimatedTime: 15,
    energyRequired: 25,
    benefits: [], // Let curiosity guide
  },

  dancing_colors: {
    id: 'dancing_colors',
    title: 'Dancing Colors',
    description: 'Light plays across the surface...',
    icon: Lightbulb,
    priority: 'medium',
    estimatedTime: 20,
    energyRequired: 30,
    benefits: [], // Beauty in motion
  },

  golden_threads: {
    id: 'golden_threads',
    title: 'Golden Threads',
    description: 'Connections weaving through space...',
    icon: TrendingUp,
    priority: 'medium',
    estimatedTime: 12,
    energyRequired: 20,
    benefits: [], // Patterns emerge
  },

  crystal_clarity: {
    id: 'crystal_clarity',
    title: 'Crystal Clarity',
    description: 'Everything comes into perfect focus...',
    icon: Target,
    priority: 'low',
    estimatedTime: 8,
    energyRequired: 12,
    benefits: [], // Clear sight
  },

  infinite_expanse: {
    id: 'infinite_expanse',
    title: 'Infinite Expanse',
    description: 'Endless possibilities unfold...',
    icon: Sparkles,
    priority: 'low',
    estimatedTime: 25,
    energyRequired: 35,
    benefits: [], // Boundless discovery
  }
};

interface CognitiveFlowProps {
  className?: string;
  onFlowAction?: (actionId: string) => void;
}

export default function CognitiveFlow({ className = '', onFlowAction }: CognitiveFlowProps) {
  const [currentFlow, setCurrentFlow] = useState<FlowState>('assessment');
  const [flowHistory, setFlowHistory] = useState<FlowState[]>([]);
  const [isTransitioning, setIsTransitioning] = useState(false);

  // Get real-time user state
  const { operator } = useHeartbeatStore();
  const { processedPayload, voltage, buffer } = useShieldStore();

  const userState = useMemo(() => ({
    spoons: operator.spoons,
    maxSpoons: operator.maxSpoons,
    voltage: voltage,
    hasUnprocessedMessages: buffer.length > 0,
    isNewUser: !processedPayload && operator.lastCheckIn.getTime() > Date.now() - (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),
    lastCheckIn: operator.lastCheckIn,
    heartbeat: operator.heartbeat,
    stressLevel: (operator.stressIndicators.physicalTension +
                  operator.stressIndicators.mentalLoad +
                  operator.stressIndicators.emotionalState) / 3
  }), [operator, processedPayload, voltage, buffer]);

  // AI-powered flow determination using mathematical models
  const determineOptimalFlow = useCallback((): FlowState => {
    const { spoons, voltage, hasUnprocessedMessages, isNewUser, stressLevel } = userState;

    // Critical safety first
    if (voltage > 8 || stressLevel > 7) return 'regulation';
    if (hasUnprocessedMessages && voltage > 6) return 'processing';

    // Energy management
    if (spoons < 30) return 'rest';
    if (spoons < 50) return 'regulation';
```
